LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGEMENT. MOVING PARTY DID NOT APPEAR. OPPOSING PARTY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY THE MOVING PARTY. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- DEFENDANTS HOI YUNG POON, MANIKANDAN JAYARAMAN AND ERIC POON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED -- TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTS REGARDING WHETHER ERIC POON STAYED AT PREMISES AS GUEST FOR MORE THAN 14 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II. REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR 1193 (GPS)

Off Calendar May-13-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Department 613; Judge Lillian Sing Clerk: J.Rios-Merida; Reporter: Carlito Mandia.

At 2:00pm cause called for settlement conference.

Jonathan Seigel appearing for the plaintiff.

Off Calendar. Settled

Trial date is vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
A P P E A R A N C E:
Jonathan Seigel, Esq. of the Law Office of STEVEN S. ROSENTHAL 928-7300 for Plaintiffs KAREN WONG, et al. opposing party
This matter was called at 9:50 a.m. No appearance by the moving party. Tentative ruling adopted -- defendants HOI YUNG POON, MANIKANDAN JAYARAMAN and ERIC POON's motion for summary judgment is denied -- triable issue of fact exists regarding whether Eric Poon stayed at premises as guest for more than 14 days. Order signed in open court.
(AJR/kh) Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-26-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Sustained with 5 days leave to amend -- no opposition filed. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

Demurrer
Off Calendar Dec-17-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Jonathan Seigel, Esq. 928-7300 for pltf & opposing party; no appearance by deft.
RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. 5 days to answer. Order signed in open court (all papers shall be filed under case #600573 rather than #401648).
